title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
